title: An Act to Clarify Parental Notifications Regarding Child Care Facility Investigations
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 30, 2025
last_house_action: 4/1/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/30/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
